name: Lucas Baxter

contactInfo.office: 100 W. 1st St., Suite 301, Mount Pleasant, TX 75455

bio: Lucas Baxter serves as the District Attorney for Titus County, overseeing felony prosecutions in the Mount Pleasant area. He is committed to delivering justice and protecting public safety in Titus County.
campaignPromises: Prosecute violent crimes to the fullest extent of the law
Target drug trafficking and distribution in Titus County
Advocate for the rights of crime victims
Run an efficient and transparent DA's office
Partner with law enforcement to reduce crime rates
